scripts.shared:build: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm shared pnpm --filter @wikiglobe/shared build
scripts.contracts:export: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan scramble:export --path=storage/app/openapi.json
scripts.contracts:generate: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec shared pnpm --filter @wikiglobe/shared generate:api
scripts.contracts:sync: pnpm contracts:export && pnpm contracts:generate && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec shared pnpm --filter @wikiglobe/shared build
scripts.contracts:check: pnpm contracts:export && pnpm contracts:generate && git diff --exit-code -- api/storage/app/openapi.json shared/src/generated/api.ts
scripts.typecheck: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec web pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.api:routes: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan route:list
